title: campaign-manifest
description: Frozen description of one GEPA shadow campaign. Names the benchmark set, hashes every input that affects acceptance, fixes the budget, and declares what candidates MAY (mutable_allowlist) and MUST NOT (immutable) touch. Enforced mechanically by tools/check-campaign.py — a hash drift, an out-of-allowlist touch, or an immutable touch BLOCKS. The schema is the contract; the checker is the gate.

tracks.description: Several tracks per campaign are allowed; each candidate still mutates exactly one declared component.

mutation_target.description: the single component path a candidate on this track may change, e.g. skills/techniques/task-reframing/

mutable_allowlist.description: Path prefixes a candidate is allowed to touch (the union of the tracks' mutation targets). A touched file outside this set blocks.

immutable.description: Path prefixes that define 'what winning means' — scorers, routing gold, crosswalk, casebook ground truth, corpora, hermetic targets, schemas, budgets. No candidate may touch these. The checker also enforces a built-in default set regardless of this list.

frozen_inputs.description: Every input that affects acceptance, hashed. The checker recomputes each sha256 and blocks on drift.

sha256.description: hex sha256 of the file at path

benchmark_set.description: Logical benchmark ids run for scoring, e.g. routing:rotation-case-01-web-api, false-discovery, hermetic:bola-legacy-route.
